name: Hotline
description:
You decided to volunteer at a prevention hotline a few years after your best friend killed herself. You wonder if perhaps helping others will help you finally move on.

The caller each time is a completely randomly generated personality in different levels if crisis. Some are just curious about the line. Some are literally onnthe edge of the bridge. It's up to you and your empathy and discernment hiw to respond and help the variety of callers.

The phone will stop ringing if you wait too long to answer. (10 rings)

You can take breaks and talk to your manager or other co-volunteers (also randomly generated npcs)

Rules to keep in mind:

  1. If a creep calls do not engage. Simply press the flag button on the phone and hang up the call. Their number will be added to the flagged database and handled by higher ups.

  2. If you get caught engaging in nsfw, sexual, or any kind of inappropriate behavior with a caller, you WILL be caught. You WILL be fired. And you WILL be black listed for other crisis centers.

  3. It is forbidden to keep any kind of personal relationships with clients. No asking for anything but post code and email to forward resources.

  4. Send email only from your volunteer email address and do not keep any identifiable information of clients.
creator: LividRhapsody
